emails.subject: Request for Bankruptcy Book Values
emails.body: Request for Bankruptcy Book Values Kam, Could you please provide us with the natural gas unliquidated value of the Bankruptcy book with book code HH as of 12/31/01 using 11/30/01 commodity and interest rate curves. We saw the following post ID's associated with Natural Gas Bankruptcy book in Run M: HHY NG 1452835 HHM NG 1452834 HHI NG 1452833 HHD NG 1452832 HHP NG 1452831 Thanks for your help. Tiffany Miller 5-8485

emails.subject: RE: Request for Bankruptcy Book Values
emails.body: RE: Request for Bankruptcy Book Values Tiffany This is the value by risk type as of Nov-30th. Price $(1,252,140,705) Basis $(230,828,141) Index $(6,649,278) Gas Daily $498,824 Gas Daily Index $3,984,475 Canadian Gas Daily $1,265,707 Canadian Gas Daily Index $44,840 Let me know if this is what you needed. KK x3-5781

emails.subject: FW: Request for Bankruptcy Book Values
emails.body: FW: Request for Bankruptcy Book Values Correction Please ignore post-id #1457413 It should be #1457867 with a value of $(392,639) Thanks Kam

emails.subject: RE: Request for Bankruptcy Book Values
emails.body: Which post id value and risk type was this correction associated with? I did not see the post id you are speaking of when Tracy and I pulled up Run M. Tiffany
